channel.title: diyfunproject — Workshop Journal
channel.description: Weekly workshop notes and build logs from an independent maker — Arduino, Raspberry Pi, 3D printing, mobile games, cloud podcasts.

item.title: Cert Quest CTA — website and Play Store on the same line
item.dc:creator: diyfunproject
item.description: The Cert Quest hero card now exposes two CTAs — one to certquests.com for the web app, one to the Play Store for the Android closed-test. Previously a single button forced visitors through the website even if they wanted the app first.

item.title: Cert Quest and IT Certif Web — separate banners
item.dc:creator: diyfunproject
item.description: Two distinct products were sharing the same banner. Split them so each project owns its own visual identity in the carousel and the Software grid.

item.title: Glaces en Seine — engine v2 anchored on the upcoming Sunday
item.dc:creator: diyfunproject
item.description: Reworked the briefing engine so every metric (cardigan threshold, thermal pivot, bribe-o-meter, ferry pulses) targets the upcoming Sunday rather than "today". Open-Meteo is queried with start_date=end_date= for the exact target date.

item.title: Chess Kombat — Chess 960 and Puzzle Survival landed
item.dc:creator: diyfunproject
item.description: Two new modes shipped on the Android build: Chess 960 (randomized back rank, mirrored on both sides) and Puzzle Survival (endless mate-in-N puzzles with an HP bar that ticks down with the clock).

item.title: Game Boy build — handheld boots a Mario clone
item.dc:creator: diyfunproject
item.description: The 3D-printed shell is on its third revision. The Arduino runs a stripped-down Mario clone on a small color LCD. Build photos and the boot video are on the project page.

item.title: Cults3D — Chaturanga 4-player set published
item.dc:creator: diyfunproject
item.description: Pushed the four-player Chaturanga set to Cults3D. Each army has its own silhouette language so all four sides read at a glance from across the table.

item.title: Terraform Bootcamp — first season wrapped
item.dc:creator: diyfunproject
item.description: The Terraform Bootcamp podcast cleared the full HashiCorp Terraform Associate syllabus across the season. Listen on Spotify.
